clause.title: Warning against use of lifts in fire

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: A warning sign must be displayed where it can be readily seen near every call button for a passenger lift or group of lifts throughout a building.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: The requirements of (1) do not apply to a small lift such as a dumb-waiter or the like that is for the transport of goods only.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Each warning sign required by (1) must comply with the details and dimensions of Figure E3D4 and consist of—

ol.li: incised, inlaid or embossed letters in a colour contrasting with the background on a metal, wood, plastic or similar plate securely and permanently attached to the wall; or
Letters in a colour contrasting with the background incised or inlaid directly into the surface of the material forming the wall.
